name: Beldex
analysis: BDX has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 21% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry $0.0827, stop $0.0782, target $0.0963 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
